专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, Electronic Information, and Communication Engineering are high-recommendation popular majors with sustained high application heat; Mechanical Engineering and Business Administration are in the differentiation wait-and-see or discouraged direction. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, the number of Physics Category candidates is about 380,000, an increase of about 120,000 compared to 2025 (about 261,000), significantly intensifying competition. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score line is 463 points, steadily rising in recent years; Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Jiangsu, with average regional appeal to Jiangsu candidates; the university has a small enrollment plan in Jiangsu (16-18 for Physics Category), making it a relatively small-scale institution in cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 52996, the slight reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (ranking number decreasing direction), the significant increase of about 46% in provincial Physics Category candidates (ranking number increasing direction), and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the reduction effect is offset by the surge in candidates, resulting in slightly intensified competition overall; the predicted minimum ranking is about 51425, with a range of 50925–51925.
